textPlain: Somewhat related, my iOS app[1] has a morse code reference and lets you train, it could be useful here.Its backstory is also a bit silly, it started as the simplest app idea I could think of; I posted more about it recently[2].[1]: https://apps.apple.com/app/simple-morse-tool/id873021583[2]: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=45569321
Pretty neat. It would be cool if it had an automatic decoder
That’s awesome that you can see everyone’s at once. Cool design.
